ns0:entry.ns0:title: Azure/AzureLocal-Supportability
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Azure/AzureLocal-Supportability
Language: powershell
Welcome to the Azure Local Supportability Forum! This is where the Azure Local team will track troubleshooting guides and issues with Azure Local. We will maintain this repo in order to provide a central location for community driven supportability content.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Micke-K/IntuneManagement
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Micke-K/IntuneManagement
Language: powershell
Copy, export, import, delete, document and compare policies and profiles in Intune and Azure with PowerShell script and WPF UI. Import ADMX files and registry settings with ADMX ingestion. View and edit PowerShell script.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: ScoopInstaller/Extras
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ScoopInstaller/Extras
Language: powershell
📦 The Extras bucket for Scoop.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: cisagov/ScubaGear
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/cisagov/ScubaGear
Language: powershell
Automation to assess the state of your M365 tenant against CISA's baselines

ns0:entry.ns0:title: dotnet/core
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/dotnet/core
Language: powershell
.NET news, announcements, release notes, and more!

ns0:entry.ns0:title: microsoft/AL
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/microsoft/AL
Language: powershell
Home of the Dynamics 365 Business Central AL Language extension for Visual Studio Code. Used to track issues regarding the latest version of the AL compiler and developer tools available in the Visual Studio Code Marketplace or as part of the AL Developer Preview builds for Dynamics 365 Business Central.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: microsoft/Agents
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/microsoft/Agents
Language: powershell
The Microsoft 365 Agent SDK simplifies building full stack, multichannel, trusted agents for platforms including M365, Teams, Copilot Studio, and Webchat.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: microsoft/Kerberos-Crypto
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/microsoft/Kerberos-Crypto
Language: powershell
Tools and information regarding Windows Kerberos cryptography

ns0:entry.ns0:title: microsoft/fabric-toolbox
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/microsoft/fabric-toolbox
Language: powershell
Fabric toolbox is a repository of tools, accelerators, scripts, and samples to accelerate your success with Microsoft Fabric, brought to you by Fabric CAT.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: microsoft/finops-toolkit
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/microsoft/finops-toolkit
Language: powershell
Tools and resources to help you adopt and implement FinOps capabilities that automate and extend the Microsoft Cloud.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: microsoft/hve-core
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/microsoft/hve-core
Language: powershell
A refined collection of Hypervelocity Engineering components (instructions, prompts, agents, and skills) to start your project off right, or upgrade your existing projects to get the most out of all Copilots

ns0:entry.ns0:title: microsoft/work-iq
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/microsoft/work-iq
Language: powershell
MCP Server and CLI for accessing Work IQ

ns0:entry.ns0:title: psmux/psmux
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/psmux/psmux
Language: powershell
Tmux on Windows Powershell - tmux for PowerShell, Windows Terminal, cmd.exe. Includes psmux, pmux, and tmux commands. This is native Powershell Tmux designed for Windows in Rust 🦀

ns0:entry.ns0:title: zoicware/RemoveWindowsAI
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/zoicware/RemoveWindowsAI
Language: powershell
Force Remove Copilot, Recall and More in Windows 11
